jd_text: Strategic Partnership Opportunity – Livbnb x Livstate Context In light of the ongoing economic and geopolitical pressures across the Middle East, many holiday home operators in Dubai are facing unprecedented challenges. Rather than scaling down or shutting operations, Livbnb is extending a strategic opportunity for CEOs and business owners to transition, stabilize, and continue generating revenue through partnership. About the Opportunity Livbnb is opening its full operational infrastructure to select holiday home companies. This is not a traditional job role it is a strategic business collaboration designed to preserve value, sustain income, and create long-term alignment. Through this initiative, partner companies can onboard their existing units into Livbnb’s ecosystem, allowing Livbnb to take over end-to-end management, including operations, marketing, guest experience, and revenue optimization. What Livbnb Offers Full integration into Livbnb’s established platform and operational systems Immediate continuity of income without the burden of day-to-day management A structured revenue-sharing model, ensuring partners retain a percentage of ongoing earnings Retention within the Livbnb ecosystem via Livstate , as a Business Development Partner Role of the CEO / Partner Transition existing holiday home units into Livbnb’s management portfolio Maintain a strategic relationship with Livbnb through Livstate Support expansion by identifying and onboarding additional units where possible Act as a long-term stakeholder in the performance of transitioned assets Broker Incentive Structure Individuals or entities who facilitate the onboarding of units into Livbnb will receive a fixed percentage share of the revenue generated from those units for as long as Livbnb continues to operate them. This creates a recurring income model aligned with performance and longevity. Why This Matters Now This moment represents a critical inflection point for smaller operators. Instead of absorbing operational losses or exiting the market, this partnership enables: Business continuity without operational strain Ongoing revenue participation Alignment with a scalable and resilient platform A pathway to remain active in the industry under a stronger umbrella Positioning This is not an exit it is a transition into a more sustainable and collaborative operating model. Conclusion Livbnb is not acquiring businesses it is building a network. A network of partners who continue to benefit from their assets, relationships, and market knowledge, while leveraging Livbnb’s infrastructure to navigate uncertain times. For CEOs and operators looking for stability, continuity, and upside this is the moment to pivot, not pause.
